calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms And For Appointment Of Third Trustee
Off Calendar May-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Winslow, via ZOOM, in propria persona as co-Trustee and counsel for James Cartan, co-Trustee.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that he may need to submit a request to modify the trusts named in this matter. Counsel reports regarding the trust history in this matter as well as the others and believes that the other Trusts have nothing to do with this specific Trust.

After additional discussion, the Petition for order Approving Modification of Trust Terms and for Appointment of Third Trustee is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Tauscher. Not reported.
